name: Acahuallan Bowl
description: Recover 4 Life Points, +2 Objective ShieldFruit is one of the locals' staples, often eaten fresh right off the tree.

name: Actor's Jewelry Box
description: Immediately gain/add +18 Originium IngotsA box containing all kinds of shattered jewelries. The young lead actor wore these jewelries and stepped onto the stage, in the end falling from its highest point.

name: Actor's Perfume
description: All friendly units recover 1% of Max HP per secondTroupe actors put this on before going onstage. Stable yet aromatic fragrances like this can help them ease pressure. That's how it seems on the surface, at least.

name: Ancient Fresco
description: When an enemy enters or is freed from Levitation and/or Weightless, they take 1000 Arts damage and are Silenced for 10 secondsWalk out of the cave, and raise your head. This has never been right, even since antiquity.

name: Ancient Gaulish Silver Coin
description: All Operators start with +6 SPA coin once circulated in the now fallen nation "Gaul." It is in very good shape, making it highly valuable as a collector's item.

name: Antiquated Sheet Music
description: Hope +4A tattered piece of sheet music. The notes can no longer be clearly read. No one knows for certain what story this piece was meant to tell.

name: Antique Casting
description: Immediately Promote 3 Operators (Does not require Hope)"Harken the forge of the sky Awaits five earthborn metals" ...Even though it can be used for all kinds of work, nobody understands its exact mechanism.

name: Assault Co-op - Sharp Blade
description: Increases the ATK of Vanguard and Guard Operators by +8% for each Vanguard or Guard Operator in the combat squadUse the sharpest spear to strike the hardest shield. I guarantee you that the shield will break first, trust me.

name: Assault Co-op Reinforcements
description: Guard Rec. Vouchers obtained from Shops or as a drop will be upgraded into Elite HR Dispatch Letters.It is difficult to gain the upper hand in frontline combat with only a single squad of Operators. Supplementing combat capabilities through Co-ops is an effective solution.

name: "Avenger"
description: All enemies take +35% Physical damageA gift from Theresis and set up by Theresa, this is the very first weapon that Ascalon received after her inaugural mission as part of the Military Council.

name: Bank of Gaul Check
description: All Operators start with +12 SPAn extravagant checkbook plated in gold and silver. Can no longer be cashed.

name: Banshee's Kiss
description: Hope +8Outsiders make extraordinary displays of bravery that far surpass their normal abilities. However, as one of the few male Banshees out there, this has become a far too common sight to Logos.

name: Bend Spears - Advancement
description: Guard Operators have -3 DP Cost and +40% Max HPThe soldiers stepped onto the battlefield, drew their blades, and met in battle.

name: Bend Spears - Army of One
description: Guard Operators have +1 Block.One does not need to don heavy armor or hold up a shield to resist enemy attacks. Oftentimes, the best defense is to quickly eliminate those that would harm you.

name: Bend Spears - Battlecry
description: For every Guard Operator on the field, all allies gain ATK +8% (stacks up to 8 times)Combat is also a group activity. The more people there are, the more confident they get, and the more powerful they become with weapons in hand.

name: Bend Spears - Bloodbath
description: Guard Operators restore 2 SP after each attackSoldiers who get bolder as time passes are rare. Most need some form of psychological counseling to alleviate the trauma of war.

name: Bend Spears - Deathmatch
description: Guard Operators have -40% DEF, but gain +40% ATK and +30 ASPDI wouldn't really recommend learning those skills from Blaze.

name: Black Tulip
description: Friendly Operators gradually gain ATK when not using a skill, up to a maximum of +60% after 60 seconds; this bonus will be reset when a skill endsThe Silence crushed the Iberians, so she wishes to speak up. If her words are not sharp enough, then her sword will speak for her.

name: "Blademace"
description: All Operators have +5 DP Cost, but gain +10% ATK, DEF, and Max HPA sword lodged in a stone. Was someone bored enough to do this?

name: Blue Silk Scarf
description: Hope +2, Squad Size Limit +1A lady's elegant scarf. Her appearance is a sign that it is safe here.

name: Blunt Claws - Advancement
description: Vanguard Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% Max HPPlant a great stone within the waters. Split the waves and part the fog.

name: Blunt Claws - Burst
description: Vanguard Operators start with +15 SPHe's already done all the reserve squad's work for them. What else do you expect?

name: Blunt Claws - Fuel
description: For every Vanguard Operator on the field, gain 1 DP every 3 seconds (stacks up to 8 times)The flames turn more intense with each additional firewood added to the pile.

name: Blunt Claws - Inspiration
description: The Redeployment Time of Vanguard Operators is reduced by -50%.It's just a strategic retreat. That way, you can see what they look like before penetrating the enemy.

name: Blunt Claws - Mastery
description: Vanguard Operators have +50% ATK and DEF"When the darkly-clad enemies rushed towards me, there were only four words on my mind — they are done for."

name: Blunt Claws - Proficiency
description: The SP Cost of Vanguard Operators' skills is decreased by 35%As an operator who often enters the battlefield before anyone else, you cannot fathom what they have been through.

name: "Brilliant Lament"
description: All enemies take +40% Arts damageHis blood yet flows. He has never left this place.

name: Broken Wand - Arts Weaving
description: Caster Operators have +25% ATKThose who gaze up at the great spires in Leithanien often see some strange or even celestial phenomena.

name: Broken Wand - Concentration
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Caster Operators by +0.4/s"When a caster intends to go all out, they will display a completely different temperament — even if we're talking about something like Miss Skyfire's grumpiness."

name: Broken Wand - Harmony
description: For every Caster Operator on the field, all allies deal +12% Arts damage (stacks up to 8 times)The solos have their merits, but a chorus can destroy everything.

name: Broken Wand - Training
description: Immediately Promote a Caster Operator (Does not require Hope)"After watching the 'performance' of certain casters, I decided to quietly put away the Leithanian textbook."

name: Cannot's Mark
description: Gain 1 Hope whenever you buy an item at the Rogue Trader or make an exchange at Lost and FoundSome people are willing to do Cannot a favor, and some are worthy for Cannot to do a "favor."

name: Captain Morgan's Wine
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 3sA wine produced in the Iberian region. Despite having gained popularity in the heart of Victoria's bustling cities, it is now discontinued.

name: Castle's Offspring
description: All friendly units have +300 DEF and +30 RES 100 seconds after deploymentWith enough time, this box will become a whole new stage.

name: Celestial Dust
description: Ranged Operators Levitate all enemies within attack range for 2 seconds when a skill is manually activatedShe gently blows away the countless records of sunrises, moonsets, and the changing of the stars. Her life is blown away that easily.

name: Children of the Walls
description: Operators deployed on the 8 tiles surrounding the Objective Point gain +2 Block and +50% Max HPThe Children of Soil and Stone carefully taught the ancient city of Kazdel how to toughen itself and protect its people behind its walls. With the advent of a protracted peace, it was broken into many little pieces and turned into amulets for adventurers heading into unexplored lands.

name: "Children's Puppet"
description: Enemies receive 1000 Arts Damage per second when stunned, frozen, or boundA simple puppet made by Iberian children using trinkets found on the seacoast. Supposedly just holding it tight will give you much richer dreams.

name: Chitinous Ripper
description: When a battle begins, a random Operator will have +100% ATK and +100% HP for that battleA more efficient way of growing an exoskeleton. It can tear prey apart, resist impact, and also be turned into a delicacy for its kin.

name: Chivalric Commandments - New Edition
description: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all friendly units have +5 ASPDTaking solemn vows is a thing of the past. The spirit of modern knighthood requires more flexible displays. Go ahead and input your number in the communications device, and you too will be an honorary knight.

name: Church Alms Meal Voucher
description: +2 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% HPIn the declining coastal towns of Iberia, certain churches will provide alms in the form of meals, which their believers can redeem using vouchers. As for how these vouchers are distributed, that is a secret.

name: "Civilight Eterna"
description: All enemies take +150% True damage.A small, black crown.

name: Coffee Plains Coffee Candy
description: +2 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +2 ASPDDossoles' famous coffee-flavored candy product. Has real caffeine added, to keep you wide awake from clock-in to overtime.

name: Coin-Operated Toy
description: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all friendly units have +3 ASPDNo idea why anyone would like a design like this, but its overall concept is indeed praiseworthy–Just insert a coin, and even a statue will start moving. There is nothing truer in this world.

name: Comprehensive Operation File
description: 5-star Operators cost -2 Hope to recruitA vessel sailing upon the land, like treading upon thin ice. Remember to always expand your worldview.

name: Conch of Divine Whispers
description: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +4% HPSound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.

name: Convalescence Experience Card
description: All Operators gain +40 ASPD for 10 seconds after deploymentA special service from the Convalescent Garden![sic] Each Operator is entitled to one physiotherapy session from the Convalescent Garden before each of their field operations. Non-transferrable.

name: Convalescence Prime Membership
description: All Operators gain +70 ASPD for 10 seconds after deploymentA special service collaboratively provided by the Convalescent Garden and the Medical Department! Each Operator is entitled to one comprehensive physical and psychological assessment, as well as a physiotherapy session. Afterwards, they can also taste Podenco's homemade flower cakes.

name: Damaged Revolver Cylinder
description: All friendly ranged units have +25% ATK.She never capitulated, even after enduring countless trials and tribulations. Her muzzle belched tongues of flame that burned like an angry sun, and the glow above her head was brighter than the daylight itself. Buried here is Outcast, our friend.

name: Dancer's Bracelets
description: All friendly units have +10% Physical and Arts DodgeThe audience breaks to an applause as the well-trained dancers waltz around the traps on stage. None of them are aware of the brushes with death the performers just have been through.

name: Defender-2
description: +5 Objective ShieldA mass-produced defensive-type drone. It doesn't make sense how it only seems to be useful in the hands of the enemy.

name: Designer's Ruler
description: All friendly units have +15% Physical DodgeCarefully measured with data and experience, those who wear this armor are known to be several magnitudes luckier.

name: "Devotion"
description: Ranged Operators deal 150 Arts damage to a random enemy within attack range with every attack or healSince antiquity, this tribe has believed that they hold a truth about Sami: Everything originally had a voice, until "It" spoke for all of them.

name: Disaster's Origin
description: All enemies take +20% Arts damage and +100% Elemental InjuryThe Sarkaz dug through the Targangils Prime Vein and Originium crystals spurted forth from Kazdel. Their fall was inevitable, so they wanted everything on this great land to be buried together with them.

name: Doll House
description: +10 Starting DPAll kids need at least one set.

name: Draft of a Speech
description: All Operators cost -2 Hope to recruitShe was a little nervous, a little worried, but still remained resolute. When the microphone was turned on, her long ears quivered slightly.

name: Dreambind Castle Model
description: +30 Starting DPYou've seen this place, and you once wandered the castle, yet you now hold it in your hand. Is this real, or is it all a dream?

name: Dreaming Essence
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.5/sSupposedly the Banshees make their aromatics only for their beloved. A single drop is enough to enchant just about anyone, bringing out any artist's inspiration and creativity.

name: Emergency Active Agent
description: Operators have increased ASPD proportional to how low their HP is, up to a maximum of +60 ASPD at 30% HPAn injection commonly used in Rim Billiton's local mines. Its strong active ingredient can stimulate the workers' senses and ensure their work efficiency in extreme environments. Life and engineering both have deadlines, and for them, this is simply a multiple-choice question.

name: "End of Times"
description: For one time only during any battle prior to the final battle of the area, gain 1 Life Point and continue onto the next step instead of concluding the exploration upon mission failureAs long as a new cycle has not been reached, there is still time to fix your mistakes.

name: Expeditioner's Field Pack
description: All Operators gain ATK +60% and Resist for 15 seconds after recovering from a negative statusThey always stuff their backpacks with survival supplies, then press forward with the determination and will to challenge the boundaries of the known.

name: Extra-Pungent Coffee Beans
description: Squad Size Limit +1, Deployment Limit +1, Objective Shield +1Coffee growers feed their beans to a rare, unusual-smelling breed of fowlbeast before extracting and processing them from its excrement. The unique aroma produced by the beast's gastric acid fermentation triples the price of the coffee beans.

name: Familiar Sculpture
description: All enemy units have -15 ASPD.A familiar face but a different vibe. Perhaps you have met this person?

name: Fatal Bolts - Advancement
description: Sniper Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% Max HPLoad, aim, and fire. Destruction arrives as scheduled.

name: Fatal Bolts - Divine Speed
description: Sniper Operators have +70 ASPDIt is said that the legendary archer of ancient Victoria can almost shoot a continuous stream of arrows.

name: Fatal Bolts - Precision
description: Sniper Operators have +20% ATKIn an era when Originium Arts were not as robust as they are now, Yan had a saying, "a pierced willow leaf from a hundred paces," to praise others for their mastery of archery.

name: Fatal Bolts - Succession
description: For every Sniper Operator on the field, all allies gain ASPD +12 (Stacks up to 8 times)Hear the sound of the first arrow, as the last pierces the torso.

name: Fatal Bolts - Synergy
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Sniper Operators by +0.5/s.The more intimate a sniper is with her weapon, the less likely she is to be betrayed by it.

name: Fatal Bolts - Training
description: Immediately Promote a Sniper Operator (Does not require Hope)"Either you learn to control your fire power, or you learn to discern your target. Got it?"

name: Fearless Blade
description: When the battle begins, the Operator with the highest DP Cost gains +50% ATK and DEFBefore Kazdel's gates he stood, an impregnable bulwark. Gaulish artilleries, Leithanian casters, and Victorian Knights all took their shots at him. Yet, even when the gates fell and the coalition retreated, the Goliath did not yield an inch.

name: Featured Canned Meat
description: +1 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units recover 3 HP per secondFor travelers on a long journey, the convenience of "Ready to Eat" is often more important than taste.

name: First Aid Kit
description: All friendly units have +35% HP"...Please use antibiotics and ethanol additives under the supervision of professionals..." —Rim Billiton Production Safety Manual

name: Flash Camera
description: Duration of single instance status effects such as stun, cold or freeze is increased by 110%Every photo shot by this camera is washed out in white, with only the victim's twisted expression faintly visible.

name: Fortification Co-op - Phalanx
description: Increases the ATK of Defender and Supporter Operators by +8% for each Defender or Supporter Operator in the combat squadLike a huge ship running over rubble.

name: Fortification Co-op - Resolution
description: Increases the DEF of Defender and Supporter Operators by +8% for each Defender or Supporter Operator in the combat squadUse the hardest shield to block the sharpest spear. I guarantee you that the spear will break first, trust me.

name: Fortification Co-op Reinforcements
description: Supporter Rec. Vouchers obtained from Shops or as a drop will be upgraded into Elite HR Dispatch Letters.It is difficult to gain the upper hand in frontline combat with only a single squad of Operators. Supplementing combat capabilities through Co-ops is an effective solution.

name: Four-Leaf Clover Fossil
description: Gain an additional choice when collectibles are dropped after battleA symbol of luck that Magallan found in a place all but devoid of life. The rock has no doubt experienced many violent changes of the lands, but it survived, giving those who come across it a small bit of lingering hope.

name: Fowlbeast Liver Pate
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.35/sA small jar of fowlbeast liver pâté. Bright and vividly colorful, it is eaten only by nobles.

name: Friston.P
description: All Allies permanently gain ASPD +5 for every Emergency Ops cleared (stacks up to 15 times)Friston would certainly not miss out on an opportunity to explore the secrets of another predecessor civilization. Oh, but Closure didn't even consider making backups, so DON'T tell her about this!

name: Frost Buck's Pauldron
description: All allied units gain ATK +40% and DEF +40% for 30 seconds when blocking 2 or more enemiesThere are no signs of injuries on his body, only a pair of eyes drained of blood and tears.

name: Frozen Husk
description: Melee Operators gain ASPD +40 for 5 seconds after taking damageThe warriors of Sami stationed in the Fjal Vetrtonn are often inspired by an illusion: As their life flows toward the earth, their originally frozen bodies become lighter and lighter.

name: Game Room Admin Access Card
description: Immediately Promote an Operator (Does not require Hope)With this, you have become master over Rhodes Island's entertainment privileges. Please exercise caution when processing the various strange applications from the Operators... and remember to lock the door every day.

name: "Gaulish Toponym Origins"
description: Gain 2 Temporary Life Points at the beginning of each battle.A book of historical place names that Mint dug out of the Doctor's office. Calais-Blason is mentioned in the book.

name: Glass Bird
description: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1"In this paradise of mine, the bird will sing forever and ever."

name: "Glorious Kazimierz"
description: Operators gain +70% ATK for 6 seconds after dodgingA Kazimierzian best-seller that adapts the deeds of the arena's brightest-shining knights into a novel. Nearl, who was exiled but returned to reclaim her laurels, occupies a considerable portion of its pages.

name: Godmother's Token
description: All enemy units have -17% ATKA laurel of bones, the token of a Sicilian noblewoman. This symbol of order will smooth the turbulance of all desires, for conflict is not allowed. Genuine or counterfeit, it still demands you to kneel.

name: Gold-Plated Dice
description: All enemy units have -15% HPThe gold-plated die has one side representing life. As for the other nineteen sides...

name: Golden Chalice
description: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all friendly units have +7 ASPDSaints, knights, and pietists. All of them are madmen. Dear God, even the chalice itself is made of pure gold!

name: Great Banshee's Veil
description: All enemies take +10% Arts damage and +50% Elemental InjuryThe former Lord of the Banshees always seemed amicable, as if that were her only side... until she pulled out her bone pen, sang softly, and impaled agonizing wails into the minds of every intruder.

name: Hand of Choker
description: Heavyshooter, Deadeye, and Besieger Operators' attacks will defeat all non-Boss enemy units at 30% or less HPWith your last strength, break open a last bit of hope for yourself.

name: Hand of Diffusion
description: Splash Caster, Chain Caster, and Blast Caster Operators recover 2 SP every time they attack an enemy unitThe more enemies you strike, the more power you take hold of.

name: Hand of Flowing Water
description: Increases the SP recovery rate of Core Caster, Mystic Caster, and Summoner Operators by +0.5/s whenever they use a skill, up to 4 stacksThe ocean's flow never ceases, because it is always surging.

name: Hand of Pulverization
description: Artilleryman, Splash Caster, and Flinger Operators gain +15% ATK for every time they deal damage to the same unit, up to 150%; this bonus will reset if no damage is dealt for 5 secondsYour goal isn't just to hit the bullseye over and over.

name: Hand of Purification
description: Bard, Phalanx Caster, and Therapist Operators deal 50% ATK as Arts damage to all enemies in their attack rangeWhere it is, dust is not.

name: Hand of Snatcher
description: Charger, Pioneer, and Tactician Operators' DP Cost -12 and gain 6 additional DP after defeating an enemyWhatever it is you do not have, snatch it away from your enemy. There is no need to hesitate.

name: Hand of Spikes
description: Protector, Arts Protector, and Duelist Operators deal Arts damage equal to 100% of their own DEF on enemy units they blockLet the enemy make his own move. He will be his own downfall.

name: Hand of Superspeed
description: Executor, Ambusher, and Dollkeeper Operators gain +100 ASPD when there are no friendly units in the eight adjacent tilesYou swing your hand, leaving not even an afterimage.

name: Healer's Path - Advancement
description: Medic Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% Max HPThe desire to save lives is a virtue that mankind must applaud, for that is the support that keeps us alive.

name: Healer's Path - Keen Hands
description: Medic Operators have +50 ASPDCompared to the feat of snatching a life from the grip of death, what is three days of coma afterwards?

name: Healer's Path - Potency
description: Medic Operators have +40% ATK.Nobody else dared to attempt such a radical treatment — except Warfarin. She never made a single mistake.

name: Healer's Path - Restore Sanity
description: Allied units within the attack range of Medic Operators gain ResistanceReinforce your thinking. In the domain of your mind, make even every weed impregnable.

name: Healer's Path - Self-Treating
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Medic Operators by +0.3/sWho says healers can't heal themselves? They simply pop some pills before continuing to help others.

name: Healer's Path - Training
description: Immediately Promote a Medic Operator (Does not require Hope)When the day comes when everyone is a doctor and can even cure the disease known as life, we will no longer need doctors.

name: Healer's Path - Wellspring
description: For every Medic Operator on the field, all allies gain Redeployment Time -5% (Stacks up to 8 times)They are clear springs formed from flowing water, and they heal all that live.

name: Hot Water Kettle
description: Immediately gain +2 Objective HP and +1 HopeSome people often use the water boiler in the Rhodes Island Office to cook instant noodles in the middle of the night. That's not a very healthy lifestyle...

name: HR Bronze Seal
description: Recruit a random 5-star Operator that is automatically PromotedEmblem assigned to specific Operators when ■■■ receives an emergency deployment command. Your receipt of it signifies that ■■■ has completed the assignment.

name: Iron Guard - Advance
description: Defender Operators have -1 Block (will not be reduced below 1), but gain +40% ATK and +40 ASPD.In exchange for an opportunity to attack, the shattered ranks made one more advance.

name: Iron Guard - Advancement
description: Defender Operators have -3 DP Cost and +40% Max HPThe shieldbearers formed a mountain range and became the earth. What they fight against are not enemies of flesh and blood. They fight against fate and injustice.

name: Iron Guard - Consolidation
description: Defender Operators gain HP +40%, DEF +40%, and RES +20No matter how hard fate hits you, just take it in.

name: Iron Guard - Impenetrable
description: Defender Operators restore 2 SP after being attackedEvery blow they endure will turn into anger and be returned severalfold.

name: Iron Guard - Invasion
description: Defender Operators have +60% ATKDefensive actions for the sake of teammates or strategic purposes often make people forget about their original aggressiveness.

name: Iron Guard - Rampart
description: For every Defender Operator on the field, all allies take 10% less physical damage (Stacks up to 8 times)Gather sand to form a tower, and gaze upon enemies from above.

name: Iron Guard - Training
description: Immediately Promote a Defender Operator (Does not require Hope)Scars symbolize glory, but who will remember the soldiers who were cut a bit too deeply?

name: Iron Guard - Tranquility
description: Defender Operators have +25% DEF and +50% Max HP."Is there anyone who can remain in formation under a bombing of that scale?" "Standing in formation? He moved a few steps forward."

name: Jet-Black Dance Shoes
description: Can deploy Melee Operators on High Ground tilesThe Columbian dancer's steps are firm and strong, her taps reverberating loudly in the air as she strikes the ground.

name: King's Buckler
description: When Life Point is at 1, all Operators have +2 BlockKeep your eyes straight ahead, and let your stalwart heart resist all hardship.

name: King's Crown
description: When Life Point is at 1, all friendly units have +50% ATK, increased to +150% ATK if you have collected 3 or more King's CollectiblesO Nameless King, may you continue to bless Iberia, even should your kingdom fall to ruin.

name: "King's Fellowship"
description: +2 Objective Shield, coverts[sic] all Life Point into an equivalent amount of Objective Shield (Cannot be reduced below 1 by this effect)The Cultists of the Deep did not achieve success overnight; they lingered at the junction between the land and sea for ages, preparing for the calamity that would come to be known as the Profound Silence.

name: Knight Lance Pro
description: Treasure Chests on the battlefield will drop more Originium IngotsDon't worry if your own strength isn't enough! Use these tiny levers to move more, and win more in every round! The grand prize is a holiday trip to Sami!

name: Lakebed Aegis
description: Objective Shield +1; all allied units gain Max HP +60% if you have any Objective Shield at the beginning of a battleThree decades ago, a child dropped his toy wooden shield into the lake. Three decades later, he bores through the frozen lake, retrieves his shield, and embarks on a hero's journey.

name: Letter of Termination Contract
description: Hope +4You can break free of this troupe with just one autograph.

name: "Little Gran Faro"
description: Deals Stun on all enemy units for 5 seconds every time an enemy unit enters the Protection ObjectiveThe illumination device produced after reverse engineering the Eye of Iberia. It is powerful enough to penetrate layers of dark clouds, as well as temporarily repel powerful enemies.

name: Live Rose
description: All friendly units have +20% healing effectivenessIs it you who nourish her, or is it her who protects you?

name: Living Woodplate
description: All allied melee units gain a Barrier equal to 50% of their Max HP on deploymentThe shamans know how trees will cling to survival, so they invite the trees to become armor for a warrior possessing a similar will.

name: Lucky Coin
description: Gain +2 Originium Ingots upon entering a non-combat node.A coin picked up from Rhodes Island. If you find one, you're sure to be able to find many more.

name: Medicine Sticks
description: All allied units gain 2 layers of Shield when deployedIn ancient times, whenever Great Yan's armies fought, they would march forward carrying these. Mulberry drew inspiration from this and made an edible plaster, excellent for working out the masseter muscle and revitalizing one's spirit.

name: "Memories of The Shard"
description: Deals 3000 True Damage on all enemy units every time an enemy unit enters the Protection Objective"It has pierced Victoria's heart, and is watching the empire bleed."

name: Military Mirror Armor
description: All friendly units have +25% DEFThis mirror armor used to be able to withstand most attacks on the chest, but with the fall of Gaul, such archaic forms of armor have become museum pieces.

name: Miniature Stage Model
description: +20 Starting DPThe red paint has not dried yet. Careful. Don't get that paint on your hand.

name: Minoan Ode
description: All Allies permanently gain HP +3% for every Emergency Ops cleared (stacks up to 15 times)"Is there a feat more worthy of praise than an expedition into no man's land? Now, yes! Go forth into the north, and write the next chapter of your saga!"

name: Miss.Christine Petting Ticket
description: Immediately Promote 2 Operators (Does not require Hope)You have the lady's permission!

name: Necklace of the Presence
description: All friendly ranged units have +35% ATK.Faith hangs ten centimeters above your heart, spoken words flow into your blood, and bullets slide into your magazine.

name: Night-Whispers in the Forest
description: +2 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% DEFA special aromatherapy set prepared for field operators by the Convalescent Garden, consisting of fifteen herbal extracts in 172 different combinations. When the wind wends into wooded vales, all creatures lower their voices, and one can find respite.

name: Northwind Construct
description: [Machine] and [Arts Creation] enemies will be immediately Frozen with their first attack for 15 secondsThough she often fails, she is still committed to helping those who would challenge their tragic fates.

name: Noxious Hemostatic Agent
description: All friendly units have +24% HP."After fermentation, the body fluids of this Originium slug can be used to stop bleeding." —"Rhodes Island Wilderness Survival Guide"

name: "Numbness and Obscenity"
description: All friendly units have +5 RESA famous art piece and the final piece created by an insane Leithanian sculptor two hundred years ago. The sculptor was known for his extraordinary talent and his participation in multiple cruel homicides. However, historical records show that few people took notice of his work. He was instead known for his features and beauty.

name: Old George Nutritional Paste
description: Operators have increased ATK proportional to how high their HP is, up to a maximum of +30% ATK at 100% HPThis poor-tasting fortified nutritional supplement was originally a "dietary supplement" periodically provided to Columbian Pioneers, but after extensive marketing, it suddenly became a "beauty product" beloved by nobles.

name: Old Steam Armor
description: All friendly units have +35% DEF.Even this old, outdated steam armor seems to carry with it the resplendence of when the Victorian monarchs cast their glory across half the world.

name: Orange Storm
description: +1 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +1% ATKA Mama John's candy product. The orange flavor, cheap and delicious, is a best-seller among children.

name: Oriron Round Shield
description: All friendly units have +15% DEFBefore the use of Oriron became widespread in today's industrial sector, the material was frequently used to forge military weapons like this one.

name: "Painful Happiness"
description: All enemy units have -15% HP and Movement SpeedOripathy is spreading among the troupe members. Some collapsed, some broke out crying, some were overjoyed, and some turned their attention to writing. It was at such a time that the young man received his coming-of-age present. He will sing his very last song as an actor.

name: Pitt's Assorted Fruits
description: +3 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +3% ATK, DEF, and HPPitt's assorted fruit candies compete with Mama John's line of products in the sweets market with a rich taste and superb cost-effectiveness. Muelsyse's favorite.

name: Polar Retrofit Package
description: When used, Support items will also be used simultaneously on the adjacent 4 tilesProudly produced by the Volvort Kochinski Extreme Environment Equipment Testing Department. It can modify a variety of devices, adapting them for polar regions and increasing their effectiveness in cold environments.

name: Pried Open Toolbox
description: Hope +4The tool box of the troupe's prop master. From nails to dummy props, it has everything.

name: "Profound Silence"
description: All enemy units have -20% HPA painting that depicts the greatest disaster in Iberian history. Its brushstrokes, colors, and images are all meaningless. "The Ægir know. The Ægir know. The Ægir know."

name: Proof of Longevity
description: Immediately gain +10 Life PointsA tree branch that has withered and flourished.When it is withered, it grows anew. When it is thriving in its fullest, it fades away yet again.

name: Pure Gold Expedition
description: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1, Deployment Limit +1The regent departed from the wastelands, and markets rose from beneath her dress like sprouts budding in the spring. The road of prosperity connected high mountains and dense forests, following her until she disappeared beyond the cliffs overlooking the western waves. —Ancient Sargon Fairy Tale

name: Pure White Dance Shoes
description: Can deploy Ranged Operators on Low Ground tilesThe Ursus dancer's steps are swift and elegant, her body moving as she wills.

name: Rainbow Jar
description: Whenever an enemy enters the Objective Point, immediately selects a random Operator waiting to be re-deployable, and reduces their Redeployment Time by halfIt is usually placed by the Sami people wherever the rainbow falls. They are meticulously maintained in order to withstand the untraceable catastrophes, both natural and man-made.

name: Ranged Co-op - Assassination
description: Increases the ASPD of Medic and Sniper Operators by +6 for each Medic or Sniper Operator in the combat squadCan't tell friends from foes at this distance? Unload a volley at them then. The enemies are the ones that failed to avoid it.

name: Ranged Co-op - Remote Strike
description: Increases the ATK of Medic and Sniper Operators by +8% for each Medic or Sniper Operator in the combat squadIf you can solve the problem from a reasonable distance, why do you have to literally butt heads?

name: Ranged Co-op Expansion
description: Medic Rec. Vouchers obtained from Shops or as a drop will be upgraded into Elite HR Dispatch Letters.It is difficult to gain the upper hand in frontline combat with only a single squad of Operators. Supplementing combat capabilities through Co-ops is an effective solution.

name: Ranged Co-op Reinforcements
description: Sniper Rec. Vouchers obtained from Shops or as a drop will be upgraded into Elite HR Dispatch Letters.It is difficult to gain the upper hand in frontline combat with only a single squad of Operators. Supplementing combat capabilities through Co-ops is an effective solution.

name: Red Bow Tie
description: Hope +2, Deployment Limit +1The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.

name: Regional Action Plan
description: 4-star Operators cost -2 Hope to recruitRhodes Island has established dedicated offices in every important hub area. The messengers are doing what they can to weave a fragile web across this land.

name: Rhodes Island Tactical Transceiver
description: Gain an additional choice when Recruitment Vouchers are dropped after battleHang in there, help's on the way.

name: Ribbon of Honor
description: All friendly units have +100% ATK when blocking only 1 enemyNumerous actors have played this character, yet none of them were able to save the character's dearest friend.

name: Ring of Thorns
description: When Melee Operators are healed, they and Operators in the adjacent 4 tiles will recover 1 SPYou were able to steady yourself while in a distorted fear. There is blood left on the thorns, and you don't know if it was you or the Snowpriest who was pricked by them. They will use whatever means they have, without batting an eye.

name: Rock Horn
description: All Operators gain ATK +20% for every Operator in the adjacent 4 tilesIf you want to gather up manpower in Sami, blowing a trumpet is definitely the best way to do it.

name: Rosmontis's Embrace
description: All enemy units have -30% DEF"Who will be the judge?"

name: Roundstone Altar
description: There is a chance after battle to permanently increase all allied units' ATK and DEF by 5% (Can stack up to 10 times)Offer a sacrifice, and receive a reward. It is so convenient that the people never think about what they are directing their sacrifices to.

name: "Silent Squad"
description: All friendly units have +35% ATK, +35% DEF, and +45% Max HPA set of exploration drones remotely controlled by the Rhodes Island Engineering Department. More efficient and safer than ever, they provide operators on field missions the omnidirectional support and defense they need.

name: Silver Forks
description: All friendly ranged units have +25% ATKOne for dealing with actors who botch their performances, one for dealing with incompetent playwrights, and one for anyone who needs it. The Chief will not tolerate any mistakes on the table.

name: Slave Hunter
description: Units that become Levitated, Weightless, or are shifted will take 50% more damage for 10 secondsAfter obtaining Nasti's designs, the Sarkaz put them to use in war right away. They flew into the sky, dominating the Ancients with waves of wrath, and the never-ending war entered a new stage.

name: Snow Doe's Glove
description: All allied units gain ASPD +80 and obtain 50% Physical and Arts Dodge for 30s when blocking 3 or more enemiesShe shoots the last three arrows in her quiver at the Frozen Monstrosity, who used them to end her life.

name: Solo Music Box
description: Hope +4, Deployment Limit +1An old music box. The music does not play when the box is opened, nor does the figure inside show any signs it is about to move. There is not a peep, and no one is breaking out in dance. Before she begins her performances with Phantom, the lead actress stares blankly into the music box.

name: Special Suppressor
description: Immediately gain +6 Life Points.An enhanced suppressor developed by Rhodes Island that can better keep the infected from losing control of their Originium Arts.

name: Spinach Pack
description: All friendly units have +60% ATK for one second after their skill becomes activeMany Cautus out there believe that popping the contents of this can into their mouths will grant them immense strength. The marketing's effectiveness is a classic success story in the industry.

name: Stalwart Aid - Assistance
description: Friendly units within the attack range of Supporter Operators gain +20% ATKBringing meals, showing the right route to take, or even having a heart-to-heart. The key difference between victory and defeat often lies in these little things.

name: Stalwart Aid - Counter-Arts
description: Enemies within the attack range of Supporter Operators have -20% DEF and -20% RESThere are many ways to weaken an enemy's defensive capabilities: positional devices, armor-stripping Arts, marking weak points, and... giving them a stomachache.

name: Stalwart Aid - Demoralize
description: Enemies within the attack range of Supporter Operators have -15% ATK.There are many ways to weaken an enemy's offensive capabilities: corroding their weapons, psychological warfare, increasing their weight, and... giving them a stomachache.

name: Stalwart Aid - Diligence
description: The SP Cost of Supporter Operators' skills is decreased by -40%Operators tend to give it their all, even to tasks that might seem trivial. The reality is, those tasks are not trivial at all.

name: Stalwart Aid - Linkup
description: For every Supporter Operator on the field, increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.2/s (Stacks up to 8 times)Hand in hand, shoulder to shoulder, brace yourselves, and look straight ahead.

name: Stalwart Aid - Secondary Front
description: Units summoned by Supporter Operators have +50% ATK."Um, I can understand the derivatives of combining mechanics with Originium Arts, but there might be something else..."

name: Stalwart Aid - Training
description: Immediately Promote a Supporter Operator (Does not require Hope)Their tactics are always diverse and colorful.

name: Stone Gargoyle
description: Immediately gain +6 Life Points.A palm-sized sculpture. Supposedly they are handmade gifts given out by the Gargoyles as a sign of friendship.

name: String Puppet
description: Enemies receive 700 Arts Damage per second when stunned, frozen, or boundThe more you struggle and try to break free, the tighter the strings get. Do you really think you are still thinking rationally?

name: "Sui's Wrath"
description: Whenever you deploy a unit, deal 3000 Arts damage to a random enemy and the area around itThe Feranmut lifts its head, heaven and earth cower in fear.

name: Support Escape Crane
description: Bring a Snowsant's Safe Escape Crane along to each battleAn emergency Snowsant's Safe Escape Crane provided to field operators.

name: Support Fog Machine
description: Bring a Broken Fog Machine along to each battleAn emergency Fog Machine provided to field operators that appears to be broken.

name: Support Landmine Set
description: Bring 3 Interference Mines along to each battleAn emergency set of Interference Mines provided to field operators.

name: Support Mr. Boom
description: Bring a Mr. Boom along to each battleAn emergency Mr. Boom provided to field operators.

name: Support Replenishment Station
description: Bring a Portable Supply Station along to each battleAn emergency Portable Supply Station provided to field operators.

name: Support Riot Pile
description: Bring 2 Riot Piles along to each battleAn emergency set of Riot Piles provided to field operators.

name: Supreme Ring
description: +50% Originium Ingot drops from battleIn Leithanian mythology, he who holds the ring enjoys the vast riches of the entire world, but greed will also be his undoing.

name: Surging Feast
description: All allied units receive +30% healing effectiveness and take -30% Elemental InjuryWe've known how to indulge since birth. Do not resist your desires. Submit to them instead.

name: Survivor Contract
description: At the start of battle, a random Operator gains +20% ATK and DEF, plus an additional +20% at the end of each (victorious) battleA very long contract, in which every term and condition is the result of experience, leaving no room for chance or sentiment. Satisfy them all to be the final survivor.

name: "The Return"
description: Operators gain +130% ATK for 6 seconds after dodgingThis Kazimierzian best-seller is said to be a collective creation by fans. "Nearl" has already become an amalgamation of many ideals and fantasies. "For her, exile was not an escape. She came back, and stood alone against the era's torrents."

name: "The Whisperer in Darknight"
description: All enemy units have -15% HP.A black vinyl. DO. NOT. TOUCH. IT.

name: Therapy Tape
description: Duration of single instance status effects such as stun, cold or freeze is increased by 150%He tried to stop you from listening. He said it was dangerous. He said you should not stay. Do you understand now? You are listening to his song.

name: Three-Dimensional Art Display
description: Restore 7 Life Point, restore an additional 1 Life Point after each battleThe impression that Rhine Lab often gives is akin to this work of art: inscrutable, multi-faceted, impossible to sift fact from fiction.

name: Timeworn Poetry Strips
description: Summons will no longer use Deployment slots"Drunk far beyond all mounts that list the realm, all beings take on souls as they demand."

name: Universal Key
description: Hope +6An old, silver key. It can open any door. As the keeper, the troupe's butler naturally needs a key that unlocks all the secrets here.

name: Unknown Instrument
description: All friendly units have +50% HPDon't ask. It's for your own good.

name: Ursus Big Bread
description: Squad Size Limit +1Food from Ursus with a strong, fermented taste. Quite sour.

name: Vampire's Bed
description: Immediately gain +8 Life Points.A lavish-looking coffin that matches the castle's aesthetics well. However, Warfarin says this is merely a stereotype.

name: Vanilla Soda
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.2/sBolívar's cheap specialty drink dates back hundreds of years. It is mixed with a variety of spices, and is known for not being very good.

name: Victorian "Scrap" Medal
description: Gain +20% Command EXP from battlesA knight's medal that Siege threw together and awarded to Dagda on the spot. The materials used are pitiful, but it holds a lot of meaning to Dagda.

name: Victory Horn
description: Duration of single instance status effects such as stun, cold or freeze is increased by 100%Blow the horn, cry out, and scatter our foes with its roar!

name: Vieux Vanguard's Blade
description: All friendly melee units have +35% ATKPrior to its downfall, Gaul first witnessed the sacrifices of its Vieux Vanguards.

name: Vinecreep Mortar Gunner
description: Enemies defeated while airborne will deal 3000 physical damage to surrounding enemiesIt's no surprise such a fantastical weapon would appear when people from different cultures let down their guard and communicate with sincerity.

name: Water of Life
description: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 2.5sThe strongest Ursus liquors go straight to one's head, but it's said that the healthy Ursusian adult can down several bottles.

name: Weave of Snow and Soil
description: Designates one deployable tile at the beginning of battle; allied Operators deployed on that tile or its surrounding 8 tiles will grant 1 SP to another Operator within those tiles whenever they gain SP from Offensive or Defensive RecoveryThose within this ring receive the attention of the snow and earth.

name: Weave of Thorns and Leaves
description: Designates one deployable tile at the beginning of battle; allied units deployed on that tile or its surrounding 8 tiles will gain CamouflageThose within this ring receive the favor of the thorns and leaves.

name: Weird Flute
description: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1A weird-looking flute. Someone plays it day in and day out.

name: White Flower Crown
description: All friendly units have +30% healing effectivenessA floral veil used in Vampire rituals. Its once vibrant redness has been sucked empty, leaving nothing only a pale white color.

name: Worn-out Group Photo
description: All enemy units have -12% DEFDo you know someone in the photo?
